Home / Services / Pediatric Chiropractic

Pediatric Chiropractic

Gentle care for Boulder's growing children and teens.

From crawling babies to competitive teen athletes, we provide age-appropriate chiropractic care for Boulder's youth. Our techniques are especially beneficial for children in Boulder's active families, addressing needs from babywearing on Chautauqua trails to teenage competitive skiing.

For infants, we focus on gentle adjustments to address birth trauma or torticollis. School-aged children receive care tailored to heavy backpack use in Boulder's hilly neighborhoods. Teen athletes get sport-specific evaluations, whether they're soccer players at Fairview High or Boulder Valley School District skiers.

We use pressure equivalent to testing a ripe avocado - safe and effective for developing bodies. Many parents report improvements in colic, sleep patterns, and recovery from playground falls at Boulder's numerous parks.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Complete developmental history review
  2. 02 Step 2: Gentle assessment using appropriate techniques
  3. 03 Step 3: Careful adjustments with light pressure
  4. 04 Step 4: Parent education for home care

Benefits

  • Supports healthy nervous system development
  • Helps with altitude adjustment in newborns
  • Improves recovery from sports injuries
  • Addresses posture from heavy backpacks

Frequently Asked Questions

At what age can children start chiropractic care?

We see patients as young as newborns. Many Boulder parents bring infants for checks after birth, especially following rapid deliveries at Boulder's high altitude which can cause spinal stress.

How does chiropractic help teen athletes?

We address growth plate concerns, uneven muscle development from single-sport focus, and injuries from Boulder's competitive sports scene. Proper alignment helps prevent overuse injuries common in young athletes.

Book an Appointment

Ready to get started with pediatric chiropractic? Contact us today.

Schedule Now Or call: 555-chi-r94
